query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `fieldMappings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `type` enum('salesperson_alias', 'city_code', 'teacher_alias', 'course_alias') NOT NULL,
  `sourceValue` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `targetValue` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `type_idx` (`type`),
  INDEX `source_idx` (`sourceValue`)
)

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `type` enum('salesperson_alias', 'city_code', 'teacher_alias', 'course_alias') NOT NULL,
  `sourceValue` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `targetValue` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `type_idx` (`type`),
  INDEX `source_idx` (`sourceValue`)
)
